items.headline: Will Strong Results And Bigger Buybacks Change Chubb's (CB) Capital Allocation Narrative?
items.summary: In recent days, Chubb reported strong quarterly results, raised its dividend for the 33rd consecutive year, and approved a multi-billion dollar share repurchase program, signaling continued focus on shareholder returns. This combination of robust operations and larger capital returns offers fresh insight into how Chubb is prioritizing cash distribution while maintaining its insurance franchise. items.headline: 3 Insurance Stocks We Think Twice About
items.summary: Insurance firms play a critical role in the financial system, offering everything from property coverage to life insurance and specialized risk solutions. But worries about an economic slowdown and potential claims deterioration have kept sentiment in check, and over the past six months, the industry has tumbled by 3.4%. This performance is a far cry from the S&P 500’s 6.9% ascent.
